zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnock於1425年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可時，他的父親Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock20歲，母親Isabell Lyle30歲。他於1441年之前與Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwood在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1468年被列為on 8 september 1468 he obtained the cession of orkney to scotland, from king christian of norway, as dowry for the king of norway's daughter, whose marriage with king james iii he had arranged。他去世於1482年4月在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克享年57歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnock于1425年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可时，他的父亲Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock20岁，母亲Isabell Lyle30岁。他于1441年之前与Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwood在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1468年被列为on 8 september 1468 he obtained the cession of orkney to scotland, from king christian of norway, as dowry for the king of norway's daughter, whose marriage with king james iii he had arranged。他去世于1482年4月在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克享年57岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

nameMeanings.name: Boyd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the island of Bute in the Firth of Clyde, from Bòid (genitive case of Bòd, the Gaelic name of the island of Bute) or Bòideach, denoting a person from Bute. Alternatively, the name may denote descendants of a Gilla filius Boed, who appears in reference to Glasgow Cathedral in the early 12th century, perhaps from the Gaelic personal name Boite, of uncertain origin.
Scottish and Irish: from the Gaelic epithet buidhe ‘yellow(-haired)’. Compare Bowie .
Manx: from Mac Gille Buidhe ‘son of the yellow-haired lad’ (compare 2 above).

variants.name: Bowie
meanings: Scottish: from Gaelic buidhe ‘yellow’, i.e. ‘yellow-haired’, pronounced as two syllables. The equivalent term in Ireland is buí, often Anglicized as boy. The surname may also be a shortened form of Gilboy .
Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Buadhaigh (see Bogue ).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnock was born in 1425, in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock, was 20 and his mother, Isabell Lyle, was 30. He married Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwood before 1441, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. In 1468, at the age of 43, his occupation is listed as on 8 september 1468 he obtained the cession of orkney to scotland, from king christian of norway, as dowry for the king of norway's daughter, whose marriage with king james iii he had arranged. He died in April 1482, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Kilmarnock, East Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnock est né en 1425, à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Isabell Lyle, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwood avant 1441, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. En 1468, à l’âge de 43 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est on 8 september 1468 he obtained the cession of orkney to scotland, from king christian of norway, as dowry for the king of norway's daughter, whose marriage with king james iii he had arranged. Il est décédé en avril 1482, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Kilmarnock, East Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnock 1425 in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock 20 und seine Mutter Isabell Lyle 30. Er hat vor 1441 in Scotland Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1468, als er 43 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als on 8 september 1468 he obtained the cession of orkney to scotland, from king christian of norway, as dowry for the king of norway's daughter, whose marriage with king james iii he had arranged aufgeführt. Er starb im April 1482 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Alnwick, Northumberland, England und wurde in Kilmarnock, East Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnock è nato il nel 1425 nel Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Isabell Lyle, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwood prima del 1441, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1468, all'età di 43 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come on 8 september 1468 he obtained the cession of orkney to scotland, from king christian of norway, as dowry for the king of norway's daughter, whose marriage with king james iii he had arranged. Morì nel aprile 1482, nel Alnwick, Northumberland, England, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Kilmarnock, East Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnockが1425年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnockは20歳，母Isabell Lyleは30歳であった。1441年以前にスコットランドでMariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwoodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1468年，43歳の時，職業はon 8 september 1468 he obtained the cession of orkney to scotland, from king christian of norway, as dowry for the king of norway's daughter, whose marriage with king james iii he had arrangedと記録されている。彼は1482年4月にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックで57歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドエアスト エイルシュアイアキルマルノックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnock(이)가 1425년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬마노크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabell Lyle(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1441년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1468년, 43세의 나이로 그의 직업은 on 8 september 1468 he obtained the cession of orkney to scotland, from king christian of norway, as dowry for the king of norway's daughter, whose marriage with king james iii he had arranged이었다. 그는 1482년 4월 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 에이르실르 킬마노크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnock nasceu em 1425, em Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Isabell Lyle, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwood antes 1441, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1468, com 43 anos, sua profissão aparece como on 8 september 1468 he obtained the cession of orkney to scotland, from king christian of norway, as dowry for the king of norway's daughter, whose marriage with king james iii he had arranged. Ele faleceu em abril de 1482, em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Kilmarnock, East Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnock родился в 1425 г. в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabell Lyle, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwood перед 1441 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. В 1468 году, в возрасте 43 лет,  он работал по профессии on 8 september 1468 he obtained the cession of orkney to scotland, from king christian of norway, as dowry for the king of norway's daughter, whose marriage with king james iii he had arranged. Он умер апрель 1482 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности килмарнокк, эаст аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnock nació en 1425, en Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Isabell Lyle, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwood antes de 1441, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1468, a la edad de 43 años, su ocupación registrada era on 8 september 1468 he obtained the cession of orkney to scotland, from king christian of norway, as dowry for the king of norway's daughter, whose marriage with king james iii he had arranged. Murió en abril de 1482, en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Kilmarnock, East Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
